synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-22394 Moderate: Oracle Linux 10 qt6-qtsvg security update
description:
[6.9.1-2.2]
- Fix CVE-2025-10728: Replace quadratic cycle check with linear recursion
  guard to prevent stack overflow
  Resolves: RHEL-119719

[6.9.1-2.1]
- Fix CVE-2025-10729: Prevent dangling pointers in SVG group node creation
  Resolves: RHEL-119699
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-22394

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-22394.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
qt6-qtsvg-6.9.1-2.el10_1.2.x86_64.rpm
qt6-qtsvg-devel-6.9.1-2.el10_1.2.x86_64.rpm
qt6-qtsvg-examples-6.9.1-2.el10_1.2.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
qt6-qtsvg-6.9.1-2.el10_1.2.aarch64.rpm
qt6-qtsvg-devel-6.9.1-2.el10_1.2.aarch64.rpm
qt6-qtsvg-examples-6.9.1-2.el10_1.2.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/qt6-qtsvg-6.9.1-2.el10_1.2.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-10728




Description of changes:

[6.9.1-2.2]
- Fix CVE-2025-10728: Replace quadratic cycle check with linear recursion
  guard to prevent stack overflow
  Resolves: RHEL-119719

[6.9.1-2.1]
- Fix CVE-2025-10729: Prevent dangling pointers in SVG group node creation
  Resolves: RHEL-119699
